changelog: v2.3.0: Schema object model (GET+POST /schema/{id}, _rrseo_schema_graph, JSON-LD output); preview/dry-run endpoint; hard validation layer (title/desc length, URL, robots, JSON-LD, allowed types, batch max 20, post type allowlist); audit log (_rrseo_change_log, GET /log/{id}); replace-all now requires confirm:true
